title: Docker Architecture, OCI Boundaries, Isolation, and Environment Evidence · Container-System Defense
summary: A release board compares fresh docker architecture, oci boundaries, isolation, and environment evidence decisions and accepts only answers tied to observable image, container, build, or Compose evidence. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for container architecture and environment evidence map. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Trace Docker CLI, contexts, Engine API, daemon, containerd, runtime, registry, and host-kernel responsibilities for one operation.
Distinguish a container, image, process, namespace, cgroup, virtual machine, and host kernel without overstating isolation.
Separate OCI image, runtime, and distribution contracts from Docker-specific implementation and product behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# docker-basics cumulative container delivery portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic manifest and evidence review only.
# They never connect to a Docker daemon, mount a socket, or execute learner commands.
workspace: docker
version-baseline:
  engine: 29.6.1
  compose: 5.3.1
  buildx: 0.35.0
  buildkit: 0.31.1
  dockerfile-frontend: 1.25
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-environment
evidence:

steps.title: Docker Client Daemon Api · changed case · Quiz Docker Client Daemon Api
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A quiz team sees Docker client 29.6.1, an unexpected remote context, Engine API 1.55, containerd-backed image storage, and a process sharing the host kernel. Trace pull and run authority without calling the container a virtual machine. Competency probe: Trace Docker CLI, contexts, Engine API, daemon, containerd, runtime, registry, and host-kernel responsibilities for one operation.

Which action demonstrates Docker Client Daemon Api without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: Docker Client Daemon Api · changed case · Quiz Docker Client Daemon Api.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for trace docker cli, contexts, engine api, daemon, containerd, runtime, registry, and host-kernel responsibilities for one operation. For Docker Client Daemon Api · changed case · Quiz Docker Client Daemon Api, keep Docker Client Daemon Api connected to mechanically reviewable Docker artifact and transfer evidence.
